blockers.title: Root domain DNS still points to Squarespace
blockers.detail: secondmindhq.com A records resolve to Squarespace IPs (198.185.159.x / 198.49.23.x). Visitors see a 'Coming Soon' parking page.
blockers.fix: Change A record for @ to Render IP (216.24.57.1) in DNS settings. Add secondmindhq.com as custom domain in Render dashboard.

blockers.title: /api/status unreachable via domain
blockers.detail: Since DNS points to Squarespace, all API routes return parking page HTML. No backend is accessible.
blockers.fix: Depends on BLK-1. Once DNS points to Render, API routes will be served by the deployed Python server.

render_status.note: Previous scan confirmed command-centre-w87p.onrender.com is serving the correct AI HQ app with landing page and pricing tiers.

summary.verdict: DOMAIN ONLINE BUT NOT SERVING PRODUCT — Squarespace parking page. DNS not pointed to Render. 2 critical blockers.
